legacy.content:
# Phase 47-01 Plan: Agent and Standalone Parity Hardening
## Objective
Keep standalone KAPLAY and agent-play workflows in deterministic contract parity while UI evolves.
## Tasks
1. Add a CI-friendly smoke target that runs: - engine build/typecheck - kaplay-demo typecheck/build - engine-mcp typecheck/parity smoke 2. Validate hotkey/route maps against available scene contracts. 3. Ensure no scene refactor bypasses engine action contracts. 4. Record canonical hash outputs for parity-smoke changes when expected. 5. Update release workflow notes for parity gates.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/engine run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` - `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run build` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run test:parity-smoke`
